model: 64x64 grid with BG=9, center cols 30-32 (CVAL=10), counter col 63 (11=unfilled/5=filled), row 63=static. Entity: HEAD (3x9 from col_left cl) + TAIL (6x3 at cl+6) + ECHO (mirror). Actions 1-7 dispatch: VU/VD row-shift, H-shift (HL/HR) with center-crossing support, counter fill, NOOP; action 7 routes vertical/horizontal by col_left LUT.
note: Hand-crafted world model derived from full transition analysis. action=7 vertical mode uses (col_left, top_row, front) LUT (38 cases in vertical zone cl<=18, 1 case in horizontal zone cl=24). Center-crossing entity (cl=24) handles echo generation at 33-35 and hole-fill at col-3. col 62 boundary included for cl=0 HR/HL echo.
